ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Type of reward program (e.g., Air Miles, Cash Back) */,
  "mailer_type" TEXT /* Type of mailer sent to the customer (e.g., Letter, Postcard) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the customer (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "overdraft_protection" TEXT /* Whether the customer has overdraft protection */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the bank */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., Checking, Savings, Credit Card) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date the account was closed, if applicable */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for savings accounts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, closed, frozen) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the account is managed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_history" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Deposit, Withdrawal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the transaction occurred */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., card, cash, online transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_history_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_ratings" (
  "credit_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit rating */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the credit rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Credit rating (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the credit rating was last updated */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Numerical credit score */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the credit rating (e.g., internal, external credit agency) */,
  "next_update_date" TEXT /* Date for the next credit rating update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the demographic information */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Size of the customer's household */,
  "own_your_home" TEXT /* Whether the customer owns their home */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_programs" (
  "reward_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward program */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward program (e.g., Air Miles, Cash Back) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward program */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of reward points accumulated */,
  "redemption_status" TEXT /* Redemption status of the reward */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mailer_types" (
  "mailer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mailer type */,
  "mailer_name" TEXT /* Name of the mailer type (e.g., Letter, Postcard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mailer type */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of sending the mailer */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery (e.g., postal, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mailer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account with the balance */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the balance */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the account on the given date */,
  "balance_type" TEXT /* Type of balance (e.g., available, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_balances_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarterly_balances" (
  "quarterly_balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarterly balance entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account with the quarterly balance */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the account for the given quarter */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the quarterly balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarterly_balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterly_balances_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_accounts" (
  "bank_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the bank account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of bank account (e.g., Checking, Savings) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the bank account */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the bank account was opened */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date the bank account was closed, if applicable */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for savings accounts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the bank account (e.g., active, closed, frozen) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the bank account is managed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the bank account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_cards" (
  "credit_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit card */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the credit card */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of credit card (e.g., Visa, Mastercard) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the credit card */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Credit card number */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the credit card */,
  "security_code" TEXT /* Security code (CVV) */,
  "card_status" TEXT /* Status of the credit card (e.g., active, blocked, lost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_cards_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "homes" (
  "home_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the home */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the home */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the home */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the home was purchased */,
  "mortgage_status" TEXT /* Mortgage status (e.g., paid off, in progress) */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the mortgage loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_sizes" (
  "household_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household size entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the household size */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the customer's household */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "adults" INTEGER /* Number of adults in the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_sizes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "own_your_home" (
  "own_your_home_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each own your home entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the own your home information */,
  "owns" TEXT /* Whether the customer owns their home */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the home was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("own_your_home_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_own_your_home_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
